title: 2019 ESC Club Champs Results

content:
Thank you to everyone to who participated in the 2019th edition of the ESC Club Championships! It was a fun event with great squash.

For the second year in a row, Abdul won the open category and the honour of his name engraved on our club Trophy.

Congrats to the winners and the finalists of each division. Each winner and runner up will be receiving a credit to their account as their prize. This credit can be used for anything that the Club provides – Pro shop, programs, lessons or just towards the account. 

Level 1 Winner – Abdel El Nady, Runner Up – Adrian de Vries
Level 2 Winner – Ross Yaremko, Runner Up – Isaac El-Hayek
Level 3 Winner – Brooke Rothwell, Runner Up – Momo Elserafy
Level 4 Winner – Mark Beaton, Runner Up – Sean Lelacheur
Level 5 Winner – Dave Grant, Runner Up – Jon Rector
Level 6 Winner – Nathan Kawecki, Runner Up – Lindsay Buchanan

Thank you to Jeff and Sandra for making everything run smoothly as always.
